name: spawriter
description: spawriter monorepo: Chrome extension + MCP server

scripts.build: npm run bundle && npm run clean:artifacts
scripts.bundle: npm run build:ext && npm run build:mcp && node scripts/package-release.js
scripts.mcp:serve: npm run mcp:build && node mcp/dist/cli.js serve
scripts.mcp:relay: npm run mcp:build && node mcp/dist/cli.js relay
scripts.deploy:firefox: npm --prefix ext run webpack-build && npm --prefix ext run lint && shipit firefox ext/
scripts.deploy: npm run deploy:firefox && npm run deploy:chrome

author: LeonBuild
